name: Ushio Inc.
summary: Ushio Inc. produces and sells light application products, industrial equipment, and other products in Asia, Europe, and North America. The company offers UV and xenon lamps, laser diodes and devices, laser units, LED lamps and modules, halogen and halide lamps, infrared emitting diodes, and lamp and halogen heaters; lamps for data projectors and illumination; and lighting for general illumination, architecture and landscape, marine, and plant growth applications. It also provides light source units, excimer lamps and irradiation units, exposure units, illumination light sources, laser modules, fishing lamps, and warning lights, as well as lighting for security applications; and lithography tools and aligners, UV curing systems, measurement equipment, photoheating equipment, laboratory instruments, and imaging and illumination systems. In addition, the company offers functional devices, power supply repair and microfabrication services, power supplies, plastic injection-molding machines, mold protection systems, joints and tubing, plastic materials, factory automation products, sound-systems, and cinema servers. Ushio Inc. was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
